arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Sociedad vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: All set for what’s expected to be a tough away game for Real Madrid. Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Carvajal, Rudiger, Militao, Mendy, Valverde, Modric, Guler, Brahim, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid and Barcelona to battle for Euro 2024 winner
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona are both interested in signing central midfielder Fabian Ruiz, who played a starring role for Spain at Euro 2024, reports in Spain have claimed. Spanish publication SPORT report that Fabian, who has three years remaining on his PSG contract, is of interest to Real Madrid, despite the abundance of midfield riches already at Carlo Ancelotti's disposal.

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Real Betis vs. Real Madrid; Liga F
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Misa, Shei, Lakrar, Rocío, Olga, Teresa, Toletti, Leupolz, Eva Navarro, Athenea, Bruun Weir starts this match off the bench, as Teresa and Toletti accompany Leupolz in the midfield.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad star explains why Real Madrid’s front-3 are not clicking yet
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at Real Sociedad has this weekend provided his take on why the star-studded frontline at La Liga rivals Real Madrid has not quite clicked…

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham left swearing after revealing Carlo Ancelotti's comment about his brother
arts.sum: Real Madrid superstar Jude Bellingham made a lightning start to his La Liga career a year ago, but that didn't stop Carlo Ancelotti threatening to replace him with his brother Jobe

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe's PSG saga turns ugly over £46million unpaid fee and court ruling
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe's Paris Saint-Germain drama shows no signs of slowing down as the French champions have refused to pay out almost £50million in unpaid wages to the Real Madrid superstar

arts.ttl: Davies transfer in 'final stretch' as Real Madrid repeat Mbappe trick
arts.sum: Real Madrid ’s transfer for Alphonso Davies is said to be in the ‘final stretch’ after the left-back ‘won’ his battle with Bayern Munich to avoid being forced out the club this summer. The tactic is part of Real’s philosophy that they had also hoped to utilise to sign Leny Yoro, however the Frenchman opted to join Manchester United instead of seeing out the last year of his contract and leaving Lille on a free.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid swoop for sensational double signing
arts.sum: Real Madrid have made a habit of playing the long game, and following what can only be described as the conclusion of the Kylian Mbappé ‘saga’ in the summer, sights are now set on two of Europe’s brightest stars: Alphonso Davies and Trent Alexander-Arnold. Madrid, quietly smirking in the background, are more than happy to play the waiting game, knowing that when January 1, 2025, rolls around, the Canadian star will be free to sign on the dotted line.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: The team’s midfield will need to play with composure in order to take care of business in San Sebastian against a strong Real Sociedad team who like to play fast and take advantage of transition opportunities. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Carvajal, Rudiger, Militao, Mendy, Valverde, Modric, Guler, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Real Sociedad vs. Real Madrid
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Real Sociedad vs. Real Madrid.
